action.reasoning: Observation: Training keeps crashing with exit code 139 (segfault). Data loading works (confirmed 105546 molecules), but full train.py segfaults. Analysis: Need to isolate the segfault cause - could be PyG DataLoader, SchNet model, or CUDA issue. Decision: Write a minimal test script to debug if SchNet+PyG works, then based on results either fix the 3D pipeline or fall back to SMILES+fingerprint approach.
